entity.summary: Community-oriented ve(3,3) decentralized exchange that moved from early Polygon development to Horizen EON and opened trading there in October 2023. Horizen wound EON down during its July 2025 migration to Base, and no verified Ascent redeployment or continuing venue was found.
entity.notes: HEI treats the protocol as dead with chain_failure because the only verified production venue was on EON and the chain was discontinued. This does not assert that the Ascent operators formally announced a shutdown; no verified migration to Base or another chain was found after EON's July 23, 2025 deprecation. V1 and V3 registry rows are modeled as versions of one protocol-level entity.

events.title: Ascent Exchange launched on Horizen EON
events.description: Ascent Exchange opened trading and liquidity on Horizen EON after moving from its initial Polygon development path.
events.notes: The October 24 first-party announcement states that trading and liquidity were open on EON.

events.title: Horizen EON deprecation ended Ascent's verified deployment
events.description: Horizen completed its migration to Base and discontinued EON, requiring users to exit EON DeFi pools before the migration deadline.
events.notes: No verified Ascent deployment after the EON deprecation was found during this review.

evidence.title: Introducing Ascent: A New Age of Automated Market Making on Polygon
evidence.notes: Early first-party introduction documents the protocol's Polygon development phase.

evidence.title: Elevating DeFi: Ascent Exchange's Launch on Horizen EON
evidence.notes: First-party launch post states that trading and liquidity were open and explains the migration from Polygon to EON.

evidence.title: Move Your wZEN and DeFi Tokens Off EON Before July 23
evidence.notes: Chain operator instructed users to exit all EON DeFi pools and stated that the EON network would wind down on July 23, 2025.

evidence.title: Horizen migration overview
evidence.notes: Official documentation states that migration completed on July 23, 2025 and that the old EON chain would be discontinued.
